mapper.select: SELECT chl.id, chl.complaint_id, chl.operator_id, chl.operator_name, chl.operator_type, CASE chl.operator_type WHEN 1 THEN '用户' WHEN 2 THEN '商户' WHEN 3 THEN '管理员' END AS operatorTypeName, chl.action, chl.content, chl.create_time FROM complaint_handle_log chl WHERE chl.complaint_id = #{complaintId} ORDER BY chl.create_time DESC
